summary: Phase D4.1 - View Files Button testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend returns file_url, file_available, content_type fields. Frontend View Files button opens RequirementFilesDrawer with file metadata, action menu with View/Download options, and download fallback toast when preview not supported.

minor.issue: mime_type and content_type are both None for uploaded files - files were stored without mime type metadata

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D4.1 View Files Button complete. View Files button on Evidence rows opens RequirementFilesDrawer. RTW Evidence has 1 verified file (JPEG). DBS Certificate Evidence has 2 files (1 PDF verified, 1 JPEG awaiting review). Files drawer shows metadata (name, upload date, source, expiry, verified status). Action menu has View, Download, Supersede/Replace, Move Category, Mark Uploaded in Error options. View action falls back to download with toast when mime_type is not available for preview detection.

view_files_button_on_evidence_row.details: View Files button visible on RTW Evidence and DBS Certificate Evidence rows when files exist

files_drawer_opens.details: Clicking View Files opens RequirementFilesDrawer with file list

file_metadata_displayed.details: Drawer shows file name, upload date, source, expiry date, verified status, verified by

action_menu_view_download.details: Action menu has View and Download options

view_download_fallback_toast.details: View action shows toast 'Opening [filename] for download (preview not supported for this file type)' when mime_type is None

multi_file_dbs_shows_all.details: DBS Certificate Evidence drawer shows 2 active files

backend_file_url_field.details: Backend returns file_url in both compliance-file documents_preview and requirements/{key}/files endpoint

backend_file_available_field.details: Backend returns file_available=True when file_url exists

backend_content_type_field.details: Backend returns content_type field (currently None for existing files)
